description: Fills the Paladin with the spirit of a crusader for 30 sec, granting 372 melee attack power. The Paladin also attacks 40% faster, but deals less damage with each attack. Only one Seal can be active on the Paladin at any one time.Unleashing this Seal's energy will judge an enemy for 20 sec, increasing Holy damage taken by up to 161. Your melee strikes will refresh the spell's duration. Only one Judgement per Paladin can be active at any one time.
name: Seal of the Crusader
